name: River Kwai Golf & Country Club
notes: GPS coordinates (14.184616, 99.071553) from where2golf.com. Address: 191 Moo 2, Wang-Krajae, Saiyoke District, Kanchanaburi 71150. Access requires a short ferry crossing across the Kwai River at km-marker 40 on Route 323 (max 2 vehicles per crossing). Carts not allowed on fairways per kolfers.com. One source (golfcards.com) cites 27 holes / par 36 — likely incorrect; all other sources confirm 18 holes / par 72. Green fees not listed online; one older review cited 600 THB green fee + 700 THB cart + 300 THB caddie but the cart figure predates the cart-not-on-fairways policy. Phone numbers seen: +66 85 931 8024, +66 34 565 089-90, +66-34-919714 — all may be valid. Website also cited as cafe.daum.net/riverkwai.cc (Korean portal mirror). Designer confirmed by where2golf.com. 7,216 yards from back tees; 6,262 yards club tees; 5,737 yards front tees. Sources: where2golf.com, golfcards.com, kolfers.com, 1golf.eu, golfasian.com
